columns.description: Exact syntactically valid provider-observed Composite FIGI from the S4 asset_observation_daily authority table. This value is not canonicalized, classified, or adjudicated.
columns.name: observed_composite_figi

columns.description: Lexicographically sorted unique syntactically valid Share Class FIGIs observed with this Composite FIGI in authority rows. The list and every item are non-null; an empty list means no valid Share Class FIGI was observed.
columns.name: observed_share_class_figis

columns.description: True exactly when observed_share_class_figis contains more than one distinct value. A conflict is retained for review and does not classify or rewrite the observed Composite FIGI.
columns.name: share_class_conflict

columns.description: Earliest bound S4 XNYS session containing an authority row for this valid observed Composite FIGI.
columns.name: first_session

columns.description: Latest bound S4 XNYS session containing an authority row for this valid observed Composite FIGI.
columns.name: last_session

columns.description: Non-negative count of asset_observation_daily authority rows whose exact provider_active value is true for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: active_row_count

columns.description: Non-negative count of asset_observation_daily authority rows whose exact provider_active value is false for this Composite FIGI. Identity quality does not alter provider activity.
columns.name: inactive_row_count

columns.description: Positive count of distinct bound S4 XNYS sessions containing an authority row for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: session_count

columns.description: Positive count of distinct exact case-sensitive provider tickers observed in authority rows for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: ticker_count

columns.description: Non-negative count of distinct non-null exact provider locale values observed in authority rows for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: provider_locale_count

columns.description: Non-negative count of distinct non-null exact provider market values observed in authority rows for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: provider_market_count

columns.description: Non-negative count of distinct non-null exact primary_exchange_mic values observed in authority rows for this Composite FIGI.
columns.name: primary_exchange_count

columns.description: Count of parent tables allowed to contribute inventory observations; fixed to one because asset_observation_daily is authoritative and universe_source_daily is reconciliation-only.
columns.name: parent_table_count

columns.description: Count of exact authority releases contributing inventory observations; fixed to the one bound asset_observation_daily release. The reconciliation-only universe release is excluded.
columns.name: source_release_count

columns.description: Lowercase SHA-256 under s7_composite_inventory_source_record_lineage_v1. Seed bytes are exactly UTF-8 of {"parent_table":"asset_observation_daily","release_id":"26819530e50cb92cbe0ec833d4b731b959c8bd2463ee2197255c02994241d44c","rule_version":"s7_composite_inventory_source_record_lineage_v1","scan_order":"artifact_path_asc,row_group_asc,row_index_asc"} with no newline; then update(bytes.fromhex(source_record_id)) for each authority row of this Composite in that exact scan order. Reconciliation rows are excluded.
columns.name: source_record_lineage_digest

description: Read-only S7 Gate A candidate inventory of every syntactically valid provider-observed Composite FIGI across the exact full-history S4 Assets release. asset_observation_daily is the sole inventory authority; universe_source_daily is reconciliation-only and cannot add observations. This candidate contains no market classification, canonical identity, eligibility, adjudication, membership mutation, or publication authority.
grain: One row per distinct syntactically valid observed_composite_figi in the exact bound asset_observation_daily authority release.

qa_rules.description: Output field order, Arrow types, outer nullability, and list item nullability must exactly match this contract.
The exact S4 release-set, authority/reconciliation roles, calendar, session range, and immutable plan bindings must validate.
Every bound authority and reconciliation Parquet artifact must match its exact path, byte size, SHA-256, row count, and Arrow schema digest.
Observed artifact, row, byte, and session totals must equal the exact bound source totals before any candidate is written.
Daily authority and reconciliation artifacts must map one-to-one to the complete exact bound XNYS session spine.
asset_observation_daily must contain no duplicate source_record_id within each session; the bounded daily reconciliation key is not a full-release uniqueness claim.
Every authority row must preserve the reviewed S4 invariant requested_active equals provider_active.
universe_source_daily must contain no duplicate selected_source_record_id within each session; the bounded daily reconciliation key is not a full-release uniqueness claim.
Every reconciliation selected_source_record_id must resolve to exactly one authority source_record_id in the same session.
Every shared reviewed field in a universe row must equal the corresponding authority row selected for the same session.
No reconciliation-only universe row, synthetic row, classification, canonical value, or adjudication may contribute to inventory aggregates.
Every output key must match the exact accepted Composite FIGI syntax; null and malformed source values are measured but excluded.
The candidate must contain no duplicate observed_composite_figi primary key.
Candidate rows must be strictly ascending by observed_composite_figi with deterministic list ordering.
Every source_record_lineage_digest must be reproduced exactly by s7_composite_inventory_source_record_lineage_v1 from its fixed seed and authority rows only.
Counts, first/last sessions, list uniqueness, conflict flag, fixed parent/release counts, and active plus inactive reconciliation must all hold.
Distinct Composite, Composite/Share-Class pair, output byte, temporary byte, RSS, batch, worker, and runtime caps must not be exceeded.

Authority rows with an invalid Composite FIGI are assigned the first mutually exclusive reason in null, empty, whitespace_only, surrounding_whitespace, length_not_12, non_upper_ascii_alnum, prefix_not_BBG order. All except null are reported here with bounded examples and excluded.

For authority rows with a valid Composite FIGI, invalid Share Class FIGIs use the first mutually exclusive reason in null, empty, whitespace_only, surrounding_whitespace, length_not_12, non_upper_ascii_alnum, prefix_not_BBG order. All except null are reported here and omitted from the list.
Composite groups associated with more than one valid Share Class FIGI remain in the candidate with share_class_conflict=true and are reported for review.
Authority rows with a null Composite FIGI are excluded from inventory and measured separately from malformed values.
Authority rows with a valid Composite FIGI and null Share Class FIGI retain the Composite group and are measured without inventing a Share Class value.
